title: sonchus runcinatus
intro: Sonchus runcinatus, also known as lesser sowthistle, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Sonchus runcinatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sonchus runcinatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to respiratory infections.
